query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, bracketGameId, bracketRound, bracketRegion, publishedModel, publishedToFeed, modelRunAt, modelTotal, awayModelSpread FROM games WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-29' ORDER BY id;
